title: Thera: The Inverted Planet
overview: On another world much like our own, a young Samoyed named Seamus Alessandro O'Shaughnessy discovers a lost girl named Dakota who has unfathomable magic! Seamus must overcome great challenges both physical & emotional alongside his best friend Carolina Oriqueda Campbell Keeshond-Seal to save Great Canyon City from the Menace known as The Blurred Blaze! Can our heroes defeat their foes while simultaneously protecting an innocent child in the process? And who exactly is The Blurred Blaze?

title: Crossfade
overview: Two lifelong friends and aspiring musicians begin to spiral downwards as one of them decides to move away to pursue a new career.

title: Super Champions
overview: Seven people think about their place in the universe.

title: Way of the Warrior Kid
overview: Jake is an injured Navy SEAL who becomes a mentor for his shy, struggling nephew Marc. Using the principles of his military training, Jake teaches Marc how to be a Warrior Kid as he enters high school.

title: The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping
overview: Return to the world of Panem 24 years before the events of The Hunger Games for the reaping of the 50th Hunger Games, also known as the Second Quarter Quell.
